title: AI-DLC Governance Overlay
description: Injects selected governance rule summaries at the discuss/execute gates and persists selection state to disk so it survives context compaction and subagent boundaries.

governance.enabled.description: Master switch for the AI-DLC governance overlay. When false, the registry resolves both discuss:pre and execute:pre steps as inactive and the overlay stays dormant.

governance.token_budget.description: Per-request governance token budget. The discuss hook resolves the same key via the CLI budget resolution order (flag > config > default 2000).
